blocks.text: whats my six digit number I forgot.

I don't have access to any six-digit number belonging to you. I'm a coding assistant — I only have access to your code and project files, not personal data like PINs, passwords, or codes.

If you think it might be stored somewhere in your project files, I can search for it — but I'd need more context about what kind of number it is and where it might be stored.
